name: Mrs Fields Malted Milk Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F (150°C).
2. In a medium bowl, combine flour, malted milk powder, baking soda, and salt. Mix well with a wire whisk.
3. Set aside the dry ingredients.
4. In a large bowl, blend white sugar and light brown sugar using an electric mixer on medium speed.
5. Add butter and mix until creamy, scraping down the sides of the bowl occasionally.
6. Add eggs, vanilla extract, and sweetened condensed milk, and beat until light and fluffy.
7. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, alternating with short bursts of mixing at low speed until just combined.
8. Do not overmix.
9. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto ungreased cookie sheets, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
10. Bake for 24-25 minutes or until cookies are lightly browned along the edges.
11. Transfer cookies immediately to a cool surface using a spatula.
